completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created BUG-016-W3 packet under specs/016-weather-connector/bugs. Classified the red 039 broad-regression evidence as weather connector owned: SourceRef duplicate risk in internal/connector/weather/weather.go and test-server double-close instability in internal/connector/weather/weather_test.go. No code or tests were modified.

Root cause triage recorded in design.md: time.RFC3339 seconds are insufficient for per-sync SourceRef uniqueness, and direct close(syncStarted) in repeated httptest handlers can panic. Next owner is bubbles.implement, followed by bubbles.test.

Recorded implementation-owned BUG-016-W3 evidence provenance: Code Diff Evidence in report.md, implementation DoD evidence for SourceRef uniqueness and idempotent weather sync test signals in scopes.md, and no validate-owned certification/status promotion. Production code was not changed in this cleanup pass.

Recorded test-owned BUG-016-W3 evidence closure: regression-quality guard, Go/full unit, format, check, and lint passed; SourceRef and repeated-handler adversarial shapes were source-verified; integration and E2E were recorded as honest blockers under explicit timeout evidence. Certification fields remain validate-owned.

Reconciled BUG-016-W3 design.md with implemented truth and accepted DOD-BUG016W3-001: seconds-level RFC3339 SourceRefs collided for same-location rapid syncs; selected design uses RFC3339Nano plus connector-local monotonic sequence; direct close(syncStarted) was replaced by idempotent sync.Once signaling with repeated-handler assertions. No certification fields changed.

Regression-owned verification completed for BUG-016-W3 protected scenarios. Ran repo-standard Go unit command, bugfix regression-quality guard, SourceRef no-sleep invariant scans, repeated-handler no-panic scans, regression-baseline guard, and CLI coverage-surface inspection. Protected weather scenarios are clean; live-stack stress, E2E, parent validation, and certification remain routed to their existing owners.

Simplify-owned review completed for the recently changed weather SourceRef and sync-signal code. Code reuse, quality, and efficiency passes found no narrow behavior-preserving cleanup to apply. Repo-standard Go unit, check, lint, format, and bugfix regression-quality guard commands passed. No source code, generated config, certification fields, or validate-owned status fields changed.

Stabilize-owned diagnostic completed for BUG-016-W3. Audited the weather SourceRef and sync-signal delta for startup, lifecycle, performance, config, build, reliability, and resource risk. Repo-standard Go unit, check, lint, format, bugfix regression-quality, artifact lint, and traceability commands passed. No source, generated config, certification fields, or validate-owned status fields changed. Shared live-stack readiness remains routed to BUG-031-005.

Security-owned diagnostic completed for BUG-016-W3. Reviewed internal/connector/weather/weather.go and internal/connector/weather/weather_test.go for secrets exposure, auth/IDOR, injection, unsafe logging, privacy leakage, SSRF-relevant request behavior, and data-leak risk from the SourceRef/test-signal delta. No findings. Repo-standard Go unit, check, lint, format, implementation-reality scan, artifact lint, and traceability commands passed; dedicated dependency scanner command was not exposed by repo CLI. No source, generated config, certification fields, or validate-owned status fields changed.

Validate-owned certification closure completed after green BUG-016-W3 runtime, artifact, traceability, implementation-reality, freshness, regression-quality, regression-baseline, integration, and E2E evidence was recorded. Parent weather user validation received the checked BUG-016-W3 entry, Scope 1 moved to Done, and certification fields were promoted. Shared stress readiness remains routed to BUG-031-005.

Audit-owned certification review completed for BUG-016-W3 after the validate/audit ordering deadlock was isolated. The audit verified that the lane has one completed scope, required phase provenance, checked DoD evidence, no framework-managed file edits, and explicit routing of shared stress readiness to BUG-031-005.

Audited BUG-016-W3 final certification packet: all DoD items are checked with evidence, Scope 1 is Done, required bugfix-fastlane phases have provenance, completedScopes and certifiedCompletedPhases are populated, no generated config or framework-managed files were edited, and shared stress readiness is still routed to BUG-031-005.

failures.summary: Same-second weather SourceRef collision risks pipeline dedup collision.
Weather sync test handlers can panic with close of closed channel when invoked repeatedly.

invocationLedger.purpose: Resolve BUG-016-W3 validate/audit certification ordering deadlock without editing framework-managed files.
invocationLedger.evidence: Updated validate/audit provenance, final DoD items, parent user-validation entry, completedScopes, certifiedCompletedPhases, and bug fixed/verified status; post-edit Bubbles guards are recorded in report.md.

notes: BUG-016-W3 is certified done. Design, implement, test, regression, simplify, stabilize, security, validate, and audit evidence are recorded with phase provenance. Regression verified the protected weather scenarios: same-second SourceRef uniqueness, no one-second sleep escape, repeated-handler no-panic assertions, and weather Go unit package health. Validation/audit closed the certification-deadlock state by recording parent weather user validation, fixed/verified bug status, Scope 1 Done, completedScopes, and certifiedCompletedPhases. Shared live-stack/stress readiness remains separately routed to BUG-031-005 and is not claimed by this weather SourceRef lane.
